hooks.command: ev=$(cat); if command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then p=$(printf '%s' "$ev" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.filePath // empty' 2>/dev/null); else p=$(printf '%s' "$ev" | grep -oE '"file_?[Pp]ath"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"[^"]*"' | head -n1 | sed -E 's/.*:[[:space:]]*"([^"]*)"/\1/'); fi; case "$p" in */memory/*.md) echo "❌ BLOCKED: local memory files are read-only — write memories via the gt MCP tool mcp__gt__memory_save (memory.save), not by editing $p" >&2; exit 2 ;; esac; exit 0

case "${GT_MEMORY_AUTORECALL:-on}" in 0|false|FALSE|off|OFF|no|NO) exit 0 ;; esac; q="${GT_HOOK_BEAD:-}"; [ -n "$q" ] || exit 0; command -v gtmcp >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; lim="${GT_MEMORY_AUTORECALL_LIMIT:-8}"; case "$lim" in ''|*[!0-9]*) lim=8 ;; esac; req=$(jq -nc --arg q "$q" --argjson l "$lim" '{query:$q,limit:$l}' 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; raw=$(gtmcp --compact call memory.recall "$req" 2>&1); rc=$?; if [ "$rc" -ne 0 ]; then printf '[autorecall] SessionStart recall failed (rc=%s): %s
' "$rc" "$(printf '%s' "$raw" | tr '
' ' ' | cut -c1-200)" >&2; exit 0; fi; [ -n "$raw" ] || exit 0; derr=$(printf '%s' "$raw" | jq -r '.error.message // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$derr" ]; then printf '[autorecall] SessionStart recall denied: %s
' "$derr" >&2; exit 0; fi; inner=$(printf '%s' "$raw" | jq -r '(.content[0].text // empty)' 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$inner" ] || inner="$raw"; md=$(printf '%s' "$inner" | jq -r '([(.memories // [])[] | "=== " + .name + " [" + .kind + "] ===
" + (.description // "") + "

" + (.body // "")] | sort) as $m | if ($m | length) == 0 then "" else "RECALLED MEMORY (auto-injected from prior work). Durable team memories below; treat any [feedback] item as a HARD operating rule.

" + ($m | join("

")) end' 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$md" ] && printf '%s' "$md" | jq -R -s '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"SessionStart",additionalContext:.}}' 2>/dev/null; if [ -n "$md" ]; then names=$(printf '%s' "$inner" | jq -r '[(.memories // [])[].name] | join(", ")' 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$names" ] && printf '[autorecall] SessionStart injected: %s
' "$names" >&2; fi; exit 0

if [ -n "$GT_CHANNEL_ROOT" ] && [ -n "$GT_HOOK_BEAD" ]; then d="$GT_CHANNEL_ROOT/merge-ready"; mkdir -p "$d"; id=$(cat /proc/sys/kernel/random/uuid 2>/dev/null || date +%s%N); printf '{"bead":"%s","branch":"%s"}' "$GT_HOOK_BEAD" "${GT_BRANCH:-$GT_HOOK_BEAD}" > "$d/.$id.tmp" && mv "$d/.$id.tmp" "$d/$id.event"; fi

if [ -n "$GT_CHANNEL_ROOT" ] && [ -n "$GT_HOOK_ACCOUNT" ] && command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then ev=$(cat); tp=$(printf '%s' "$ev" | jq -r '.transcript_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); sid=$(printf '%s' "$ev" | jq -r '.session_id // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$tp" ] && [ -f "$tp" ]; then off="${GT_HEARTBEAT_FILE:-/tmp/gt-qoff-$sid}.qoff"; start=$(cat "$off" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); end=$(wc -l < "$tp" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ "$end" -gt "$start" ]; then s=$(tail -n +$((start+1)) "$tp" | jq -sc '[.[]|select(.type=="assistant" and .message.usage!=null)]|group_by(.message.model)[]|{model:(.[0].message.model//"unknown"),input:([.[].message.usage.input_tokens//0]|add),output:([.[].message.usage.output_tokens//0]|add),cache_read:([.[].message.usage.cache_read_input_tokens//0]|add),cache_creation:([.[].message.usage.cache_creation_input_tokens//0]|add)}' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$s" ]; then d="$GT_CHANNEL_ROOT/quota-feed"; mkdir -p "$d"; printf '%s\n' "$s" | while IFS= read -r sm; do [ -n "$sm" ] || continue; id=$(cat /proc/sys/kernel/random/uuid 2>/dev/null || date +%s%N); printf '{"account":"%s","session":"%s","sample":%s}' "$GT_HOOK_ACCOUNT" "${sid:-$GT_HOOK_ACCOUNT}" "$sm" > "$d/.$id.tmp" && mv "$d/.$id.tmp" "$d/$id.event"; done; fi; printf '%s' "$end" > "$off"; fi; fi; fi

case "${GT_MEMORY_AUTORECALL_TURN:-}" in 1|true|TRUE|on|ON|yes|YES) ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac; command -v gtmcp >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; ev=$(cat); if command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then q=$(printf '%s' "$ev" | jq -r '.prompt // .user_input // empty' 2>/dev/null); else q=$(printf '%s' "$ev" | grep -oE '"prompt"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"[^"]*"' | head -n1 | sed -E 's/.*:[[:space:]]*"([^"]*)"/\1/'); fi; [ -n "$q" ] || exit 0; req=$(jq -nc --arg q "$q" '{query:$q,limit:3}' 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; raw=$(gtmcp --compact call memory.recall "$req" 2>&1); rc=$?; if [ "$rc" -ne 0 ]; then printf '[autorecall] turn recall failed (rc=%s): %s
' "$rc" "$(printf '%s' "$raw" | tr '
' ' ' | cut -c1-200)" >&2; exit 0; fi; [ -n "$raw" ] || exit 0; derr=$(printf '%s' "$raw" | jq -r '.error.message // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$derr" ]; then printf '[autorecall] turn recall denied: %s
' "$derr" >&2; exit 0; fi; inner=$(printf '%s' "$raw" | jq -r '(.content[0].text // empty)' 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$inner" ] || inner="$raw"; md=$(printf '%s' "$inner" | jq -r '([(.memories // [])[] | "=== " + .name + " [" + .kind + "] ===
" + (.description // "") + "

" + (.body // "")] | sort) as $m | if ($m | length) == 0 then "" else "RECALLED MEMORY (auto-injected for this turn). Durable team memories relevant to your prompt below; treat any [feedback] item as a HARD operating rule.

" + ($m | join("

")) end' 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$md" ] && printf '%s' "$md" | jq -R -s '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"UserPromptSubmit",additionalContext:.}}' 2>/dev/null; exit 0
